post.description:
Register a new company with an admin user.
This creates both the company and the first user (admin role).
Use multipart/form-data to include logo file.

- company_slug: Optional - auto-generated from company_name if not provided
- user_username: Optional - auto-generated from email if not provided
Login with email and password (form data).

Admin login - only for platform superadmin.
Different from regular login - requires superadmin role.

Verify email with token from verification link.
Token format: "user_id-email"

Logout the current user by blacklisting their access token.
The user will need to login again to access protected endpoints.

put.description:
Edit current user's company profile.
- name: can only be changed once every 30 days
- slug: can only be changed once every 30 days
- description: can be changed anytime
- logo: optional logo file upload

delete.description:
Delete current user's company and ALL associated data.
This will permanently delete:
- The company
- All company users
- All livestreams
- All recordings

This action cannot be undone!

get.description:
Public page for a company/streamer.
Viewers can visit /companies/{company-slug} to see the company and join live streams.

Get all members of a company.
Only company members can view this.

schema.title: Response Get Company Members Companies  Company Id  Members Get

post.description:
Add a new user to a company.
Only admins can add users.

get.description:
Get user details.
Users can only view other users in their company.

delete.description:
Delete (deactivate) a user from a company.
Only admins can delete users. Cannot delete yourself.

post.description:
Upload company logo image.
Saves to: /company_loggs/{company_slug}/{date}/filename

Start a new AUDIO-ONLY livestream.
Creates a Cloudflare Live Input and returns WebRTC URLs for audio broadcasting.

Start a new VIDEO livestream.
Creates a Cloudflare Live Input and returns WebRTC URLs for video broadcasting.

get.description:
Get playback URLs for a livestream.
Returns WebRTC playback and HLS/DASH URLs if available.

post.description:
Stop a livestream.
Only the creator or an admin can stop a stream.

Note: Recording upload is handled separately via the /{slug}/upload-recording endpoint.

get.description: Get all livestreams for the current user's company.

schema.title: Response Get Company Livestreams Livestreams Get

get.description: Get a specific livestream by slug.

post.description:
Upload a recording for an existing livestream.

The livestream must have ended (be inactive) before uploading a recording.
Only the creator or an admin can upload a recording for a stream.

Returns the stream name, description, and the S3 URL for playback.

get.description:
Get livestream chat messages with pagination.
Returns newest messages first.

schema.title: Response Get Livestream Messages Livestream Chat  Slug  Messages Get

post.description: Send a chat message to the livestream.

put.description:
Edit a chat message.
Only the message author can edit.

delete.description:
Delete a chat message (soft delete).
Only the message author or an admin can delete.

post.description:
Get a presigned S3 URL for uploading a recording.
The client uploads directly to S3 using this URL, then calls /complete.

Mark an uploaded recording as complete.
The s3_key comes from the /presign response.

get.description: Get all recordings for the current user's company.
Get a specific recording by ID.

delete.description:
Delete a recording.
Only admins can delete recordings.

schema.title: Response Get All Companies Admin Companies Get

get.description: List all users across all companies (admin only).

schema.title: Response Get All Users Admin Users Get

get.description: List all livestreams across all companies (admin only).

schema.title: Response Get All Livestreams Admin Livestreams Get

get.description: List all recordings across all companies (admin only).

schema.title: Response Get All Recordings Admin Recordings Get

StreamType.title: StreamType
StreamType.description: Type of livestream - audio only or video

VolPresignedURLResponse.title: VolPresignedURLResponse
VolPresignedURLResponse.description: Response with presigned S3 URL for upload

VolRecordingCompleteRequest.title: VolRecordingCompleteRequest
VolRecordingCompleteRequest.description: Request to mark upload as complete

VolSignupResponse.title: VolSignupResponse
VolSignupResponse.description: Signup response - either tokens or verification message
